message:
feat(abi-tests): expand c11threads/ctype/locale test coverage

c11threads: 25→36 (sleep edge cases, TSS multi-key/overwrite, thrd_equal
different threads, return code propagation, call_once multi-threaded,
cnd_broadcast wake-all)

ctype: 29→38 (EOF classification, toupper/tolower round-trips, boundary
chars, control char sweep, table accessor digit/passthrough tests)

locale: 32→42 (per-category queries, nl_langinfo day/month/yesexpr,
ngettext large count, gettext/dgettext null safety)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
